=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (7:7-7:13) TS6133: 'Config' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (7:16-7:56) TS377056: `Context.Service` is assigned to a variable here, but this API is intended for a class declaration shape such as `class Config extends Context.Service<Config, ConfigService>()("Config") {}`. effect(serviceNotAsClass)
  Fix 0: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to class declaration"

[D3] (11:30-11:92) TS377056: `Context.Service` is assigned to a variable here, but this API is intended for a class declaration shape such as `class ArtifactStore extends Context.Service<ArtifactStore, ArtifactStoreService>()("@my-app/ArtifactStore") {}`. effect(serviceNotAsClass)
  Fix 0: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to class declaration"

[D4] (14:7-14:16) TS6196: 'MyService' is declared but never used.
  (no quick fixes)

[D5] (17:7-17:8) TS6133: 'x' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Convert to class declaration" ===

--- file:///.src/serviceNotAsClass.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics serviceNotAsClass:warning
import { Context } from "effect"

interface ConfigService {}

// Flagged: const variable with Context.Service
class Config extends Context.Service<Config, ConfigService>()("Config") {}

// Flagged: exported const variable with Context.Service
interface ArtifactStoreService {}
export const ArtifactStore = Context.Service<ArtifactStoreService>("@my-app/ArtifactStore")

// Not flagged: correct class extends form
class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, { port: number }>()("MyService") {}

// Not flagged: non-Context.Service const
const x = 42


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable serviceNotAsClass for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Convert to class declaration" ===

--- file:///.src/serviceNotAsClass.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics serviceNotAsClass:warning
import { Context } from "effect"

interface ConfigService {}

// Flagged: const variable with Context.Service
const Config = Context.Service<ConfigService>("Config")

// Flagged: exported const variable with Context.Service
interface ArtifactStoreService {}
export class ArtifactStore extends Context.Service<ArtifactStore, ArtifactStoreService>()("@my-app/ArtifactStore") {}

// Not flagged: correct class extends form
class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, { port: number }>()("MyService") {}

// Not flagged: non-Context.Service const
const x = 42
